criteria_verification.evidence: Created src/services/__init__.py with a module docstring. File exists and is importable.
criteria_verification.notes: Created src/services/__init__.py with a module docstring. File exists and is importable.

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented get_focus_categories() at module level in src/services/insight_extractor.py. Function resolves focus area names to InsightCategory lists using FOCUS_PRESETS mapping. Tested by 8 tests in TestGetFocusCategories class.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented get_focus_categories() at module level in src/services/insight_extractor.py. Function resolves focus area names to InsightCategory lists using FOCUS_PRESETS mapping. Tested by 8 tests in TestGetFocusCategories class.

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented build_extraction_prompt() with category descriptions, output format instructions, guidelines, and transcript embedding. Tested by 8 tests in TestBuildExtractionPrompt class.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented build_extraction_prompt() with category descriptions, output format instructions, guidelines, and transcript embedding. Tested by 8 tests in TestBuildExtractionPrompt class.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `chunk_transcript(transcript, max_chars, overlap_chars)` splits long transcripts at paragraph boundaries
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented chunk_transcript() that splits on \n\n paragraph boundaries with _force_split() fallback for single long paragraphs. Tested by 8 tests in TestChunkTranscript class.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented chunk_transcript() that splits on \n\n paragraph boundaries with _force_split() fallback for single long paragraphs. Tested by 8 tests in TestChunkTranscript class.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `prepare_for_extraction(transcript, video_id, focus_areas, max_insights)` returns complete extraction metadata
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented prepare_for_extraction() that returns dict with all required keys: extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights, chunks. Tested by 14 tests in TestPrepareForExtraction class.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented prepare_for_extraction() that returns dict with all required keys: extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights, chunks. Tested by 14 tests in TestPrepareForExtraction class.

criteria_verification.evidence: When 'all' is in focus_areas, returns list(InsightCategory) — all 24 categories. Tested by test_all_keyword_returns_all_categories and test_all_with_other_areas.
criteria_verification.notes: When 'all' is in focus_areas, returns list(InsightCategory) — all 24 categories. Tested by test_all_keyword_returns_all_categories and test_all_with_other_areas.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_focus_categories` falls back to 'general' for unknown focus areas
criteria_verification.evidence: When no valid focus areas match, logs info and returns FOCUS_PRESETS['general']. Tested by test_unknown_focus_area_falls_back_to_general.
criteria_verification.notes: When no valid focus areas match, logs info and returns FOCUS_PRESETS['general']. Tested by test_unknown_focus_area_falls_back_to_general.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_focus_categories` deduplicates when same area specified twice
criteria_verification.evidence: Uses set-based deduplication preserving insertion order. Tested by test_deduplication_when_same_area_specified_twice which verifies len(result) == len(set(result)) == 4.
criteria_verification.notes: Uses set-based deduplication preserving insertion order. Tested by test_deduplication_when_same_area_specified_twice which verifies len(result) == len(set(result)) == 4.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `chunk_transcript` returns single chunk for short transcripts
criteria_verification.evidence: Early return [transcript] when len(transcript) <= max_chars. Tested by test_short_transcript_returns_single_chunk.
criteria_verification.notes: Early return [transcript] when len(transcript) <= max_chars. Tested by test_short_transcript_returns_single_chunk.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `chunk_transcript` maintains overlap between chunks for context continuity
criteria_verification.evidence: Overlap is computed from end of stored chunk and prepended to next chunk. _force_split also maintains overlap. Tested by test_overlap_between_chunks and test_default_overlap_is_500.
criteria_verification.notes: Overlap is computed from end of stored chunk and prepended to next chunk. _force_split also maintains overlap. Tested by test_overlap_between_chunks and test_default_overlap_is_500.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `prepare_for_extraction` returns: extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights, chunks
criteria_verification.evidence: All 9 keys plus video_id returned in the dict. Tested by test_contains_all_required_keys which checks all required keys are present.
criteria_verification.notes: All 9 keys plus video_id returned in the dict. Tested by test_contains_all_required_keys which checks all required keys are present.
